title: Foxy’s Cheating Game
description: Foxy’s crew uses dirty tactics to twist the race, putting the Straw Hats under pressure inside the bizarre pirate game.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Chopper, Usopp. Foxy’s crew uses dirty tactics to twist the race, putting the Straw Hats under pressure inside the bizarre pirate game.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: They played "3-coins" and lost five times,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: ... that's so foolish and meaning- less.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: you can cry. You can scream, but...

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: No matter how foolish it sounds...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I do. I would rather die.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It should come any moments now...

summary: Foxy’s crew uses dirty tactics to twist the race, putting the Straw Hats under pressure inside the bizarre pirate game.
